zh.of Burton,Maelor Gymraeg,Denbighshire,Wa: 英國威爾斯丹比爾伯頓
zh.Burton, Denbigh, Wales: 英國威爾斯丹比爾伯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton於大約1268年出生在威爾士丹比爾伯頓時，他的父親Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY34歲，母親Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield39歲。他於1284年與Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton在威爾士丹比爾伯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯丹比爾伯頓，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾。

zh-hans.of Burton,Maelor Gymraeg,Denbighshire,Wa: 英国威尔斯丹比爾伯頓
zh-hans.Burton, Denbigh, Wales: 英国威尔斯丹比爾伯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton于大约1268年出生在威尔士丹比爾伯頓时，他的父亲Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY34岁，母亲Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield39岁。他于1284年与Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton在威尔士丹比爾伯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在英国威尔斯丹比爾伯頓，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton was born about 1268, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY, was 34 and his mother, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, was 39. He married Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton in 1284, in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.of Burton,Maelor Gymraeg,Denbighshire,Wa: Burton, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.Burton, Denbigh, Wales: Burton, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton est né environ 1268, à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton en 1284, à Burton, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Burton, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton um 1268 in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY 34 und seine Mutter Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield 39. Er hat 1284 in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Burton, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton è nato il circa 1268 nel Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton nel 1284, nel Burton, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Burton, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burtonが約1268年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンで生まれた時，父Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWYは34歳，母Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefieldは39歳であった。1284年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンでAnnes verch Iorwerth of Burtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブルトンで死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton(이)가 대략 1268년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1284년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 버턴에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton nasceu aproximadamente 1268, em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton em 1284, em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton родился около 1268 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton в 1284 г. в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности буртон, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dafydd ap Gronwy of Burton nació aproximadamente 1268, en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Lord of PENMYNYDD Tudor Hen ap GRONWY, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Angharad verch Ithel Fychan of Englefield, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Annes verch Iorwerth of Burton en 1284, en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Burton, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
